name: Mushroom Gravy
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Flour (whole wheat, kamut, millet or quinoa) – up to 1/2 cup
2 tablespoons dark miso – up to 3 tablespoons
1 tablespoon Vegetable broth powder – up to 2 teaspoons
recipeInstructions:
1. To eliminate oil, sauté the mushrooms in tamari or a bit of water instead. If using oil, sauté the mushrooms in it.
2. Add the flour and stir constantly over medium-low heat for 1-2 minutes until the flour is lightly browned for added flavor.
3. Gradually add the remaining ingredients (tamari or dark miso, vegetable broth powder, sea kelp) and whisk continuously until well mixed with no lumps.
4. Stir on medium heat until very hot.
5. Reduce heat to the lowest setting and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 10-15 minutes until the sauce thickens.
6. Serve over cooked vegetables, burgers, meatballs, or whole grains and enjoy! MAKES: 2 1/2 CUPS
